title: オーシャンSの後に・カワイイの秘策

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan runs well in the Ocean Stakes, and
the response to her Cutie ♪ Derby is also
excellent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her next opponent, Biko Pegasus,
boasts far more popularity than her on UmaTok.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Curren Chan has a secret plan, though
she keeps it to herself as we proceed to the first
round of the Cutie ♪ Derby—the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
